violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a clean and sanitized container. Sausage, onions, tomato, meat not stored in container.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Items not date marked in cooler.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Coolers/freezers missing temperature measuring devices.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Freezers and cooler needs cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters in hood system needs to be cleaned. Build up of grease in filters.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Divider between garbage can and shelve it broken off in places. Bowls sitting next to divider/garbage can. Not protected from contamination.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls and ceiling needs cleaning.
